headline: 75% Upside For LLY Stock?
summary: Even without its metabolic business, management argues Eli Lilly (LLY) would be one of the fastest-growing pharmaceutical companies in the industry. This is not a single-product story. The company's immunology, oncology, and neuroscience medicines collectively grew by 160%, showing the depth of its R&D engine.

headline: 3 Stocks Estimated To Be Trading 16.4% To 42% Below Intrinsic Value
summary: In the last week, the United States market has stayed flat, yet it is up 26% over the past year with earnings forecast to grow by 17% annually. In such a robust market environment, identifying stocks trading below their intrinsic value can present unique opportunities for investors seeking potential growth.

headline: Does Decnupaz Approval Validate ABBV's ADC Strategy in Oncology?
summary: AbbVie's FDA approval of Decnupaz for BPDCN marks its first blood cancer ADC and expands a strategy built on deals and internal development.

headline: CEO of ABB on meeting the surging power demand for AI data centers
summary: ABB CEO Morten Wierod discusses the shortage of skilled workers to build AI data centers, meeting the increasing power demand for those facilities, and ways to reduce their power consumption.
